title: T-029 — Summary primitive — read-only key/value list with optional diff highlighting
prompt:
# T-029 — Summary primitive — read-only key/value list with optional diff highlighting

PRD: `docs/prd/00-FOUNDATION-PRD.md` — sections: §5.y
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`

## Goal
Read-only key/value summary used by P8/P9 Confirm patterns and P10 Preview-compare. Supports optional diff highlighting (added/changed/removed).

## Implementation contract
packages/ui/src/Summary.tsx: props = { rows: { label: string; before?: ReactNode; after: ReactNode; status?: 'unchanged'|'added'|'changed'|'removed' }[] }. Renders a <dl> with <dt>/<dd>. When status='changed' or 'added' or 'removed', applies a coloured left-border via tokens.css (no inline styles). The Settings schema_view_modal (modals.jsx:111-138) uses the same key/value pattern as a baseline; parity references that prototype. Diff variants get their own Storybook stories.

## Prototype parity
Canonical anchor: `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/settings/modals.jsx:111-138`.
Rationale: spec-driven primitive (PRD §5.y `Summary`); nearest reusable prototype excerpt is the `schema_view_modal` key/value list at lines 111-138.
Closeout must demonstrate structural, visual, and interaction parity per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md` (RTL snapshot + parity checklist + screenshots; axe a11y check).

## Files (scope)
- packages/ui/src/Summary.tsx [create]
- packages/ui/.storybook/Summary.stories.tsx [create]
- packages/ui/src/__tests__/Summary.test.tsx [create]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/settings/modals.jsx:111-138 [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the Summary renders rows in unchanged mode, when compared to the schema_view_modal key/value block in prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/settings/modals.jsx:111-138, then it matches structurally (dl with dt/dd pairs in the same order as the rows prop), visually (uses tokens.css for spacing — no inline styles), and interactionally (no interactive controls; entirely read-only with role='term'/'definition') — verified by Summary.test.tsx
2. Given a row has status='changed', when rendered, then a coloured left-border (via the design token --color-warning) is applied and the row's accessible name includes 'changed'
3. Given an empty rows array, when rendered, then the component renders an EmptyState fallback (T-030 dependency satisfied via prop fallback) without crashing

## Test strategy
- RED: write packages/ui/src/__tests__/Summary.test.tsx asserting parity + diff variants before Summary.tsx exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter @monopilot/ui test'

## Risk red lines
- Do not use inline styles for diff colours — must come from tokens.css for tenant theming hook (PRD §5.y)

## Dependencies (must be complete first)
- T-025

## Closeout evidence
Provide: changed_files, test_commands_and_results, acceptance_criteria_status (per AC), deviations_from_prd, git_status. Use the test-driven-development skill (RED test before implementation) and requesting-code-review at GREEN.
